title: Query for all items and subitems in a board
excerpt: I need a graphQL query to pull all items and subitems for all columns in a specific group id “topics” In a specific board

posts.author: Zubair2icy (Zubair Abdulqadir Okhayold)
posts.cookedHtml: I need a graphQL query to pull all items and subitems for all columns in a specific group id “topics” In a specific board

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Try this:

query getItemsAndSubItems($boardIds: [ID!]!, $groupIds: [String!]!) {
  boards(ids: $boardIds) {
    groups(ids: $groupIds) {
      items_page {
        items {
          id
          name
          subitems {
            id
            name
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

Add the variables as required:

{
  "boardIds": [1234],
  "groupIds": ["topics"]
}

In the API playground, it will look like this:

Screenshot 2024-11-17 at 16.55.40526×1074 44.7 KB

Try there first.
